name: product-release-gate
description: Create verifiable submission and release gates for product material.

interface.shortDescription: Automate product submission and release gates
interface.longDescription: Create immutable submission manifests, run fail-closed submission and release checks, collect test evidence, produce final release material, and retain auditable gate receipts.
defaultPrompt: Run the product release gate preflight.
Create a submission event for these build artifacts.
Run release checks for the final material.
